Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL BROME OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL and CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION #180's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards is Granted, no opposition filed.
